user_query: I'm working on a research project and need to gather DNS and WHOIS data for multiple domains. Can you retrieve the DNS entries and WHOIS information for 'example.com', 'example.org', and 'example.net'? Please include the IP addresses, record types, and registration details for each domain.

TaskList.description: Retrieve DNS entries for 'example.com', 'example.org', and 'example.net'. This includes gathering IP addresses and record types.
Retrieve WHOIS information for 'example.com', 'example.org', and 'example.net'. This includes registration details.
